name: DOL VETS TAP Hub
whatItProvides: Employment-focused transition resources, workshops, and career training opportunities for separating service members and military spouses.

name: Employment Fundamentals of Career Transition (EFCT)
whatItProvides: A one-day foundational course covering job search basics, career assessment, civilian labor market introduction, and transition pathways.

name: DOL Employment Workshop (DOLEW)
whatItProvides: A multi-day intensive workshop covering resume construction, interview techniques, networking, salary negotiation, and job search strategies.

name: Career and Credential Exploration (C2E)
whatItProvides: A two-day vocational track focusing on identifying credentials, certifications, licenses, and apprenticeships aligned with post-transition goals.

name: Employment Navigator and Partnership Program (ENPP)
whatItProvides: One-on-one individualized career counseling, resume reviews, placement assistance, and connection to employment partners.

name: Transition Employment Assistance for Military Spouses (TEAMS)
whatItProvides: Specialized workshops tailored to the unique employment challenges faced by military spouses and caregivers.

name: Wounded Warrior and Caregiver Employment Workshop (WWCEW)
whatItProvides: Customized job search and transition counseling tailored for wounded, ill, or injured service members, particularly those in the IDES process.

name: DOL VETS Resource Guide
whatItProvides: An online index of all employment tools, directories, and web portals used throughout the DOL TAP workshops.

name: DOL VETS Curriculum Catalog
whatItProvides: Course outlines, runtime durations, delivery methods, and lesson plans for all DOL-offered transition courses.
